Retention of Grade of Incumbents in Positions on Effective Date, as added by , , , provided that:Pub. L. 114–328, div. A, title V, § 502(tt)Pub. L. 115–91, div. A, title V, § 506(a)(1)131 Stat. 1374Dec. 12, 2017“The grade of service of an officer serving as of the date of the enactment of this Act [, see below] in a position whose statutory grade is affected by an amendment made by this section [see Tables for classification] may not be reduced after that date by reason of such amendment as long as the officer remains in continuous service in such position after that date.”Dec. 23, 2016[, , , provided that: ]Pub.
